appDescription.message: Save WeChat official account articles as Markdown — one shortcut to local folder

popupNotArticleMsg.message: Navigate to a WeChat article page (mp.weixin.qq.com/s/...) and try again.

optionsSubtitle.message: Save WeChat articles as Markdown with one shortcut

optionsFolderDesc.message: Pick a folder on your computer. Articles (Markdown + images) will be saved here directly — no prompts, no zip extraction.

optionsFolderHint.message: Tip: pick a folder inside Dropbox / OneDrive / iCloud to sync articles across devices.

optionsFolderReady.message: Folder is ready. Press Ctrl+Shift+S on any WeChat article to save.

optionsShortcutSaveDesc.message: Extracts the article, downloads images, and writes everything into your chosen folder. No popups, no zip.

optionsShortcutCopyDesc.message: Copies the full article as Markdown (images keep remote URLs). Paste directly into Notion, Obsidian, or any editor.

optionsShortcutNote.message: You can change these shortcuts at

optionsModeClipboard.message: Copy to clipboard (images keep remote URLs)

optionsModeBoth.message: Both — save to folder AND copy to clipboard

swFolderAccessLost.message: Folder access lost. Falling back to zip download...

swNoFolderSet.message: No folder set. Saving as zip download...

swDirectSaveFailed.message: Direct save failed. Falling back to zip...

swExtractionFailed.message: Could not find article content. Make sure you are on a WeChat article page.

swNotArticle.message: This page is not a WeChat article. Navigate to a WeChat article (mp.weixin.qq.com/s/...) and try again.

optionsOutputHint.message: Choose "Obsidian" if you use Obsidian as your note-taking tool for fewer broken image links.
